name: Frittata Di Campagna Al Taleggio (Country-sty
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Green peppers, peeled and cut into julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill the green peppers, then peel and cut them into julienne strips.
2. In a skillet, sauté the onions in oil until transparent; set aside when ready.
3. In a bowl, hand whip the eggs until frothy. Add the sautéed onions, salt, pepper, and green pepper strips.
4. In the same skillet (adding more oil if needed), cook the omelette on both sides until still slightly soft inside (alla lacrima) but well-cooked on the outside.
5. Place the omelette on an oven-safe plate and top with Taleggio cheese cubes.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 150°C (300°F) until the cheese has melted.
7. Sprinkle with parsley and serve immediately.
